findings.description: User-supplied username is concatenated directly into a SQL string at the query call, allowing SQL injection.
findings.remediation: Use a parameterized query so username is bound as a parameter rather than interpolated.

findings.description: Login endpoint compares the password digest with a non-constant-time equality check.
findings.remediation: Use a constant-time comparison for secret material.

findings.description: Open redirect: the destination is taken from user input without a host allow-list.
findings.remediation: Validate the redirect target against an allow-list of internal hosts.

findings.description: Informational: a defense-in-depth header is absent but no sensitive data is served here.
findings.remediation: Consider adding the header for defense in depth.
